name: X-Golf Middleton
about: X-Golf Middleton is a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator venue offering access to seven high-tech simulators for play, practice, and training. It operates as a sports bar and entertainment center, providing a full bar and food menu alongside its golf facilities. The venue is designed for individuals, groups, and events, catering to various skill levels with a focus on convenience and accessibility. Pricing is based on simulator rental by the hour, making it a flexible option for both casual play and serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Convenient all-weather golf playing and training accessible year-round
Vibrant social atmosphere with a full bar and food menu, ideal for groups and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu including shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulator system with built-in automatic tees and ball collection

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, so you can play without your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as X-Golf Middleton has its own full bar and kitchen menu available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, it is recommended to book an additional hour for each person added to the group.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Middleton welcomes children of all ages and is suitable for families.
